description_long: This is a modern, high-caliber sniper rifle with a long, heavy barrel and a robust, angular stock. The rifle features a prominent telescopic scope mounted on top, designed for precision long-range targeting. Its body is primarily matte black, with a synthetic or polymer finish, and includes a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The muzzle is fitted with a large, multi-ported muzzle brake to reduce recoil. The magazine is detachable and box-shaped, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The overall design is tactical and utilitarian, suitable for urban or field deployment.
description: A matte black, long-barreled sniper rifle with a telescopic scope, pistol grip, and a large muzzle brake, designed for precision shooting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle brake and the narrow profile of the barrel and scope.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, the scope, pistol grip, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock and the alignment of the scope with the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the bolt and magazine area.
